name: rcliment1987-skills
description: Skills personnels BIMSmarter — prompt engineering, debug React, stack Mistral/Groq, UI, n8n, Firebase

plugins.name: bimsmarter-prompt
plugins.description: Framework elite pour créer et optimiser des prompts BIMSmarter (GID-Assistant, Workflow Generator, n8n agents)

plugins.name: react-debug
plugins.description: Détection et correction des bugs React récurrents : focus loss, re-render, stale state, autocomplete

plugins.name: mistral-proxy
plugins.description: Architecture et maintenance du proxy PHP Mistral/Groq BIMSmarter avec fallback et rotation de clés

plugins.name: bimsmarter-ui
plugins.description: Charte graphique BIMSmarter : tokens couleurs HSL, composants glass panel, tables, boutons, structure HTML de base

plugins.name: bimsmarter-n8n
plugins.description: Debug et conception de workflows n8n BIMSmarter : webhooks inter-apps, RAG Supabase, format JSON agents

plugins.name: bimsmarter-firebase
plugins.description: Patterns Firebase/Firestore BIMSmarter : requêtes optimisées, règles sécurité, scalabilité IFC, Auth
